notes: Quiet no-op verification run (~06:45 UTC, early Sunday), ~2.5h after the previous run (04:15Z). Today's headline events — TdF stage 15 (11:10 UTC), F1 Belgian GP race (13:00 UTC), World Cup final Spain–Argentina (19:00 UTC), The Open R4, Corales R4 — had NOT happened at run time, so there were no results to write. The board was already accurate through Saturday's runs and the prior 04:15Z run.

Three parallel scout subagents (cycling/TdF; broad Norwegian sweep over F1/golf/tennis/athletics/football; CS2+chess), all with real web search. ALL THREE reported CONFIRMED with zero AMENDs — the entire board re-verified correct against the web. No independent write-time fact-checker was needed because there were no candidate new/amended events.

Cycling (TdF): stage 14 result (Pogačar solo, del Toro 2nd +38s UAE double, Seixas 3rd) + GC (Pogačar yellow, Vingegaard +4:30, Evenepoel +5:04, Seixas +5:19 white, Ayuso +5:22; Tobias Halland Johannessen best Norwegian 14th +16:40; green Pedersen 397 pts, polka-dot Pogačar 52 pts) confirmed against cyclinguptodate + procyclingstats. Stage 15 start 11:10 UTC + stage 16 ITT start 11:00 UTC confirmed. No NEW Norwegian withdrawals — the only Norwegian abandon this Tour remains Torstein Træen (DNS stage 7); the freshest exits are Debruyne (BEL) and Charmig (DAN, correctly excluded — Danish). All six tracked Norwegians still racing. Danmark Rundt (29 Jul) still has no confirmed Norwegian broadcaster (DR/DRTV is the Danish holder) → streaming left empty with honest note.

No confirmed NEXT start for Hovland (FedEx St. Jude 13–16 Aug is ranking-gated, field locks after Wyndham ~2 Aug) or Ventura (3M Open 23–26 July unconfirmed) → correctly not added.
